channel.title: APS on History
channel.description: Recent content in APS on History

item.title: APS.10 Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford & Sliding Puzzle
item.description: Shortest path algorithms (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford) and BFS-based state-space search illustrated with the sliding puzzle problem.

item.title: APS.06 Tarjan's SCC Algorithm
item.description: How a single depth-first walk unravels every cycle in a directed graph, without ever looking back.

item.title: APS.05 RMQ, Segment Tree, Sparse Table
item.description: From range minimum query to LCA in O(1): Segment Tree, Sparse Table, and Euler tour reduction.

item.title: APS.04 String Matching
item.description: From naïve O(nm) to KMP O(n+m): prefix function, rolling hash, and binary search on longest repeated substring.

item.title: APS.03 Geometric Problems
item.description: From cross product to convex hull: a complete walkthrough of CCW, line segment intersection, and the Monotone Chain algorithm.
